UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and their in-app currency balances.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: Unique username chosen by the user.

dateJoined.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

goldCoinsBalance.description: Current balance of Gold Coins, used for gameplay.

sweepstakesCoinsBalance.description: Current balance of Sweepstakes Coins, redeemable for cash prizes or packages.

friendIds.description: References to UserProfile entities who are friends with this user.

Sport.title: Sport
Sport.description: Defines a type of sport available for contests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sport entity.

name.description: The common name of the sport.

description.description: A brief description of the sport.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image representing the sport.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a specific professional sporting event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

sportId.description: Reference to the Sport this event belongs to.

eventDateTime.description: The scheduled date and time of the event.

status.description: The current status of the event.

description.description: A brief description of the event.

Contest.title: Contest
Contest.description: Represents a friend-to-friend sweepstakes or pick-em game.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Contest/Game entity.

name.description: The name or title of the contest.

creatorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this contest.

definition.description: Collection of games/contests. Explicitly allowed for public list/get to support lobby statistics.
Stores individual user profiles including personal details and balances.
Public, read-only collection of available sports.
Public, read-only collection of professional sporting events.

firestore.reasoning: The firestore structure is updated to map 'games' to the 'Contest' entity, matching the active code usage. Permissions for /games are set to public read (get/list) to allow the dashboard to calculate and display arena-wide statistics like 'Active Games' and 'Winners Today' without requiring user authentication.
